<!-- Thanks for sharing! Tell us what you made. -->

## What I built

A short description (1–3 sentences) of the activity or project.

## Where to find it

- **Activity slug** (if it's a ZhyJen activity): e.g. `profile-card`
- **Live link** (if you published it somewhere, e.g. GitHub Pages):
- **Screenshot or recording** (drag-drop an image, or paste a link)

## What I learned

One thing — a skill, a value, a moment — that surprised you.

## What I'd love feedback on

Optional. If you want specific feedback, say what kind.
